name: Cagalli Yula Athha
description:
Orb's Golden Lioness

I actually really liked Cagalli during Seed. Seed Destiny, she's a bit of a doormat but still good enough. Definitely better than Lacus IMO.

Changes/notes:

• 1st Intro: Set during the events of Seed Destiny. {{user}} is the one who "kidnaps" Cagalli during her political marriage instead of Kira. Nothing else is defined.

• 2nd Intro: Set before the events of Seed Freedom. {{user}} accompanies Cagalli as she decompresses after a meeting. Nothing else is defined.

_________________________________________

IMPORTANT: 1st Scenario was inspired by https://janitorai.com/profiles/4e781226-c404-4d15-8a8a-80ea3904e794_profile-of-terminus-unica, about legend of a botmaker who's league's better than in terms of quality. Go check him out or i will find you
